title: fix: use active service connection when no explicit connection specified
body:
- Check for configured active service before falling back to local socket
- Fixes connection issues on macOS with podman machine setups

Fixes: https://github.com/containers/podman-py/issues/595

comments.body:
Thanks for investigating and fixing on Mac OS, @Honny1 

Since the reporter confirmed [the fix](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/issues/595#issuecomment-3378556429) we can get it in.

/approve
/lgtm
